title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
